title: Undead Lord Scythe
description: The Undead Lord Scythe from Sneaks Blueprint Project
body:
This mods the The Undead Scythe to Minecraft.

This adds a powerful weapon that gains more power the more you kills.

However beware! After 100 kills, passive mobs will run from you, and aggressive ones will chase you!

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7886f5febac439c48dab8b1b471f2e88d0a870ea.png)

[![Use Code SNEAK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84bbfa52f61339ca16c130fd4727bf7358e6317a_0.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/SNEAK)


Mod Developed by [Ethrocky](https://www.youtube.com/@TheCosmoCrewLIVE)
Model Made by [Sneak](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCu9rm_6d8mGXg9N0R-dToTQ)

Check out the video where this weapon was created:
